We You Bunleng and Marcel Lemonde the Co Investigating Judges ofthe Extraordinary
Chambers inthe Courts ofCambodia
Noting the Law onthe establishment ofthe Extraordinary Chambers dated 27 October 2004
Noting Rule 22 ofthe Internal Rules ofthe Extraordinary Chambers
Noting thejudicial investigation initiated against
Last name KAING First name GuekEav Alias Duch Male
Born on 17 November 1942 in the village of Poevveuy CommunePeam Bang District Stoeung
Province Kompong Thorn Nationality Cambodian Profession Teacher
Noting the designationby the Defense Support Section on request ofthe above mentioned person of
Mr Kar Savuth as his Lawyer dated 31 July 2007
Noting the acceptance by Mr Kar savuth dated 31 July 2007
1 We accredite and recognise Mr Kar savuth as Lawyer ofthe above mentioned person for a
provisional period ofone month
2 This lawyer is authorised to assist his client to freely communicated with him and to participate in
any investigative action
Datedthe 31 day ofJuly2007 inPhnom Penh
